title: No Skeletons
description: A mod that removes skeletons from the game.
body:
![NO SKELETONS FINALLY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f253dae8d574bdd4c488e7ee199a2ea6f274cfa.png)

# NO SKELETONS... FINALLY.

## Have you ever wanted to delete skeletons from existence?

Don’t worry.  
This is the mod for **you**.

---

### No Skeletons

This is like my [No Pigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-pigs) mod —  
**but this time it actually has a purpose.**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Skeletons will not spawn.  
Naturally, manually, or with spawn eggs.

</details>

---

> Skeletons had it coming tbh.
